annotation_target.structure: Recapitulation consequent — familiar melody settling toward conclusion
teaching_goals: the conclusion is approaching — play with the sense of completion
the ripples should feel like they are slowing down toward rest
style_tips: pp with slight broadening as the conclusion approaches

teaching_notes.note: The familiar phrase settling toward conclusion — let it rest.
technique: arm weight decreases toward pp ending

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 55–58 of Clair de Lune (Suite bergamasque, III) (continuation of mm. 51–54), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 55–58 and describe how the recapitulation continues.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 55–58.
Measures 55–58 continue the recapitulation — the familiar melody and rippling accompaniment settle further into their concluding statement. Let me loop mm. 55–58.
Clair de Lune mm. 55–58: recapitulation continuation, familiar melody settling toward conclusion. Pairs with mm. 51–54.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
